description: This release adds public APIs for Amazon QuickSight Spaces, Agents, and Flows. Spaces APIs enable management of curated resource collections. Agents APIs provide lifecycle control over AI-powered agents that leverage Spaces. Flows APIs add CRUDL APIs for automated workflows.

Add support for multi-region replication, enabling synchronization of user data and configurations to a secondary user pool in a standby Region. Add support for customer managed keys (CMK) in AWS KMS for encrypting user pool data at rest.
